vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The rule only requires editing the Chrony configuration file to ensure time sources are specified with the 'server' directive. This change does not affect authentication, authorization, filesystems, or require a reboot, and follows standard hardening practices for NTP configuration.
